headline: Why ServiceNow (NOW) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of enterprise workflow automation company ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) jumped 6.2% in the morning session after Bernstein reiterated an Outperform rating, emphasizing that the company remains a foundational enterprise AI agent platform, and arguing that its core business process infrastructure is insulated from being replaced by large language models.

headline: ServiceNow Qlik Alliance Aims To Make NOW The Enterprise AI Nerve Center
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) has announced a new partnership with Qlik to integrate governed enterprise data and analytics directly into ServiceNow workflows and AI driven processes. The collaboration is designed to bring deeper operational context, governance, and discovery capabilities into ServiceNow for enterprise customers. The move introduces new platform functionality that links data visibility with workflow execution, targeting demand for unified AI driven operations. ServiceNow has been...
